---
title: "Elizabeth Missing Sewell"
---

## Elizabeth Missing Sewell

**Dates:** (19 Feb 1815-17 Aug 1906)

### Description

novelist, schoolmistress, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1871-94)

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from 25th August [1882]
- Letter from April 2d 1881
- Letter from Sept 13th 1877 
- Letter from March 3d 1876
- Letter from Oct 7th 1874
- Letter from Decr 11th 1871
- Letter from Sept 8th [1871]
- Letter from [13 May 1871]
- Letter from March 3d 1871
- Letter from [1871?]
- Letter from September [1870]
- Letter from Sept 13th [1870]
- Letter from May 27th [1870] 
- Letter from [28 January 1870]
- Letter from [1870]
- Letter from Decr 17th [1869]
- Letter from Sept 27th [1869]
- Letter from May 14th [1869]
- Letter from [April? 1869[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Jany 25th [1869]

*... and 47 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
